| * [v](/wiki/Template:United_States_Code_sidebar "Template:United States Code sidebar") * [t](/wiki/Template_talk:United_States_Code_sidebar "Template talk:United States Code sidebar") * [e](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Template:United_States_Code_sidebar "Special:EditPage/Template:United States Code sidebar") |

**Title 49 of the United States Code** is a [positive law title](/wiki/Positive_law_(United_States_Code) "Positive law (United States Code)") of the [United States Code](/wiki/United_States_Code "United States Code") with the heading "**Transportation**."

The title was enacted into positive law by [Pub. L.](/wiki/Act_of_Congress#Public_law,_private_law,_designation "Act of Congress") [95–473](https://uslaw.link/citation/us-law/public/95/473), § 1, October 17, 1978, 92 [Stat.](/wiki/United_States_Statutes_at_Large "United States Statutes at Large") [1337](https://legislink.org/us/stat-92-1337); [Pub. L.](/wiki/Act_of_Congress#Public_law,_private_law,_designation "Act of Congress") [97–449](https://uslaw.link/citation/us-law/public/97/449), § 1, January 12, 1983, 96 [Stat.](/wiki/United_States_Statutes_at_Large "United States Statutes at Large") [2413](https://legislink.org/us/stat-96-2413); and [Pub. L.](/wiki/Act_of_Congress#Public_law,_private_law,_designation "Act of Congress") [103–272](https://uslaw.link/citation/us-law/public/103/272), July 5, 1994, 108 [Stat.](/wiki/United_States_Statutes_at_Large "United States Statutes at Large") [745](https://legislink.org/us/stat-108-745) (subtitles II, III, and V-X)

During the time between when the Title 49 positive law codification began in 1978 and when it was completed in 1994, the remaining non-positive law sections were placed in an appendix to Title 49.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

In 1995, the [ICC Termination Act](/wiki/ICC_Termination_Act_of_1995 "ICC Termination Act of 1995"), substantively and significantly amended Title 49.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

In 2010, Congress enacted [Title 51](/wiki/Title_51_of_the_United_States_Code "Title 51 of the United States Code") as a new positive law title concerning [NASA](/wiki/NASA "NASA") and commercial space programs. As part of the codification, the heading of Subtitle IX was marked "transferred" and the contents of such subtitle were moved to Title 51.[[4]](#cite_note-4) Five years later, the [FAST Act](/wiki/Fixing_America%27s_Surface_Transportation_Act "Fixing America's Surface Transportation Act") inserted a new Subtitle IX. The heading of new Subtitle IX was given the heading "Multimodal Freight Transportation."[[5]](#cite_note-5)

* Subtitle I—[Department of Transportation](/wiki/United_States_Department_of_Transportation "United States Department of Transportation")
* Subtitle II—[Other Government Agencies](/wiki/National_Transportation_Safety_Board "National Transportation Safety Board")
* Subtitle III—General and Intermodal Programs
* Subtitle IV—Interstate Transportation
* Subtitle V—Rail Programs
* Subtitle VI—Motor Vehicle and Driver Programs
* Subtitle VII—Aviation Programs
* Subtitle VIII—[Pipelines](/wiki/Pipeline_transport "Pipeline transport")
* Subtitle IX—Multimodal Freight Transportation
* Subtitle X—Miscellaneous

## Outline of title 49

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Title_49_of_the_United_States_Code&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Outline of title 49")]

[Title 49](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49)

### Subtitle I — Department of Transportation

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Title_49_of_the_United_States_Code&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Subtitle I — Department of Transportation")]

[Subtitle I](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-I)

* [Chapter 1](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-I/chapter-1) — Organization
* [Chapter 3](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-I/chapter-3) — General Duties and Powers
* [Chapter 5](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-I/chapter-5) — Special Authority
* [Chapter 7](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-I/chapter-7) — Transferred

### Subtitle II — Other Government Agencies

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Title_49_of_the_United_States_Code&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Subtitle II — Other Government Agencies")]

[Subtitle II](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-II)

* [Chapter 11](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-II/chapter-11) — National Transportation Safety Board
* [Chapter 13](https://www.law.cornell.edu/uscode/text/49/subtitle-II/chapter-13) — Surface Transportation Board

### Subtitle III — General and Intermodal Programs
